name: Jackie Mason
blurb: A former rabbi, he built a celebrated late-career run with a series of one-man Broadway shows, beginning with the Tony-honored The World According to Me!
bio: Jackie Mason was an American stand-up comedian and actor known for his Yiddish-inflected delivery, sharp political satire, and observational humor about Jewish and American culture. A former rabbi, he built a celebrated late-career run with a series of one-man Broadway shows, beginning with the Tony-honored The World According to Me!

timeline.ev: Controversial Ed Sullivan Show appearance leads to a temporary ban
Broadway hit The World According to Me! opens
Voices Rabbi Hyman Krustofski on The Simpsons

accolades: Special Tony Award for The World According to Me! (1987)

bits.yt_title: Jackie Mason Holds Nothing Back | Carson Tonight Show
